TruckRestrictionsWarningListener
This interface should be implemented in order to receive truck restriction warnings.
TruckRestrictionsWarningOptions
Truck restrictions warning options.
TruckRestrictionWarning
Represents truck restrictions.
TruckRoadType
Specifies Truck road type
TruckSpecifications
Truck specifications contain vehicle related attributes.
TruckType
Deprecated.
Will be removed in v4.27.0.
TunnelCategory
Specifies the tunnel categories.
TurnOnRedRegulation
The regulations for turning on the red color of the traffic light.
TwoFingerPanListener
Interface for handling two finger pan gestures.
TwoFingerTapListener
Interface for handling two finger tap gestures.
UnitSystem
Represents the available unit systems(imperial/metric).
UpdateStatistics
Defines statistics related to the success or failure of patched bundles.
UsageStats
A class that gathers statistics of the HERE SDK network usage for uploaded and downloaded data.
UsageStats.Feature
Represents the feature enum associated with the gathered usage stats.
UsageStats.NetworkStats
Provides network statistics in bytes per method.
VehicleProfile
A vehicle profile describes the vehicle being used with the HSDK.
VehicleRestriction
Represents a vehicle restriction.
VehicleRestrictionIconProperties
Encapsulates properties for generating vehicle restriction icons using IconProvider.
VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight
VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight contains max permitted weight during the trip, in kilograms, along with the specific type of maximum permitted weight restriction.
VehicleRestrictionMaxWeightType
VehicleRestrictionMaxWeightType represents the specific type of the maximum permitted weight restriction.
VehicleSpecification
Contains vehicle related attributes.
VehicleSpecification.BusBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a bus.
VehicleSpecification.CarBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a car.
VehicleSpecification.PrivateBusBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a private bus.
VehicleSpecification.ScooterBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a scooter.
VehicleSpecification.TaxiBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a taxi.
VehicleSpecification.TruckBuilder
This class constructs a VehicleSpecification for a truck.
VehicleType
Defines the type of the vehicle.
Venue
Controls the VenueModel inside the VenueMap object.
VenueDrawing
Represents a drawing inside the VenueModel.
VenueDrawingSelectionListener
The interface for listeners for the VenueDrawing selection event.
VenueEngine
VenueEngine is an add-on to the base map functionality with its own content loading and cache.
VenueEngineInitCallback
This method will be called on the main thread when VenueEngine initialization is completed.
VenueErrorCode
Specifies possible errors that may occur during loading of indoor maps
VenueException
Specifies possible errors that may occur during loading of indoor maps
VenueGeometry
Represents a geometry inside the VenueLevel.
VenueGeometry.GeometryType
Geometry types.
VenueGeometry.InternalAddress
Represents an internal addresses of the geometry inside the venue.
VenueGeometry.LookupType
Defines how the geometry will be presented.
VenueGeometryFilterType
Filter types for the VenueGeometry search.
VenueGeometryStyle
Represents a style of the VenueGeometry.
VenueInfo
Represents the venue info existing in a catalogs contains id and name.
VenueInfoListListener
The interface for listeners for the list of VenueInfo load event.
VenueLabelStyle
Represents a style of the label.
VenueLevel
Represents one level of a building or a complex of buildings inside the VenueDrawing.
VenueLevelSelectionListener
The interface for listeners for the VenueLevel selection event.
VenueLifecycleListener
The interface for listeners for the Venue lifecycle events.
VenueListener
The interface for listeners for venue loading events in VenueService.
VenueLoadErrorCallback
A method which is called on the main thread when VenueMap.selectVenueAsync(String, VenueLoadErrorCallback) has been completed.
VenueMap
Connects a map with venues.
VenueMapLifecycleListener
The interface for listeners for the Venue lifecycle events.
VenueMapListener
The interface for listeners for venue loading events in VenueService.
VenueModel
Represents a building or a complex of buildings, like airports or universities.
VenueSelectionListener
The interface for listeners for the Venue selection event.
VenueService
Offers methods to download venues.
VenueService.VenueOptionalFeature
Optional features enum
VenueServiceInitStatus
Initialization status types of the VenueService.
VenueServiceListener
The interface for listeners for lifecycle events in VenueService.
VenueStyle
Represents a style of the venue.
VenueTopology
Represents routing topologies inside the VenueLevel.
VenueTopology.AccessCharacteristics
Represents the access characreisticas of a topology.
VenueTopology.TopologyDirectionality
Available directions.
VenueTransportMode
Available mode of transport on indoor topology.
ViolatedRestriction
ViolatedRestriction contains all the violated restriction details for the planned trip.
ViolatedRestriction.Details
Optional restriction details, contains additional information depending on the specific violation, zero or more member might be set.
VisibilityState
Represents the visibility state of an SDK map view's object.
VisualNavigator
This class provides all functionality of NavigatorInterface.
VisualNavigatorColors
This class contains colors used by VisualNavigator to render the route and the maneuver arrow visualization.
W3WSearchCallback
The method that will be called on the main thread when a search operation in W3WSearchEngine has been completed.
W3WSearchEngine
what3words is an alternative geocode system designed to identify any location on the planet.
W3WSearchError
Specifies possible errors that may result from a w3w search query.
W3WSquare
Contains information about one of the squares in the what3words geocode system.
WalkAttributes
Types of walk attributes.
WallClock
Clock used to properly retrieve time-dependent data from the map.
WarningNotificationDistances
Distances for emitting warnings according to the timing profile.
WarningType
Identifies the warning type.
WatermarkStyle
Defines the style of the HERE watermark logo.
Waypoint
Represents a waypoint, used as input for route calculation.
WaypointType
Defines if the waypoint is a stop over, or a hint for a desired polyline of a route.
WeatherType
Weather type attached to RoadSignWarning or VehicleRestriction.Condition which limits the conditions for which the sign is applicable.
WebDetails
Contains information about images, editorials, rating and a urls to them.
WebEditorial
Contains information about editorial article and a link to it.
WebImage
Contains image information and direct link to it.
WebRating
Contains information about rating and a url to review.
WebsiteAddress
Represents data related to specific website address
WebSource
Contains information about provider of the item and a direct link to the item.
WeightPerAxleGroup
Struct which defines the weight of the different axle groups of a vehicle.
WeightRestriction
Defines a weight restriction.
WeightRestrictionType
Defines the type of a weight restriction.
WifiPositioningOptions
Wi-Fi positioning options.
ZoneCategory
Identifies categories of zones which routes avoid going through when used in AvoidanceOptions.
